articles.title: Aave CEO: Current Yield-Farming ‘Craze’ in DeFi Is ‘Pretty Much Money Printing’
articles.description: Aave chief executive officer (CEO) Stani Kulechov says the yield farming craze for cryptoassets is coming to an end, despite a bullish outlook for decentralized finance (DeFi). In an interview with Crypto Briefing, Kulechov commented on the current state of DeFi, including solutions to problems facing the industry. Kulechov highlighted the emphasis in DeFi on […]

articles.title: Chainlink (LINK) Investors Can Now Earn Interest on Their Tokens via BlockFi
articles.description: Cryptocurrency lending platform BlockFi has added support for Chainlink (LINK), effectively allowing LINK investors to earn interest on their holdings in the cryptocurrency by depositing them into BlockFi. BlockFi is a well-known crypto lending firm that allows users to earn interest on their crypto holdings. It supports Bitcoin (BTC) Ether (ETH), Litecoin (LTC), several stablecoins, […]

articles.title: Justin Sun Offers $500,000 For Jack Dorsey’s First Ever Published Tweet as NFT
articles.description: Tron CEO has offered half-a-million USD for Jack Dorsey’s first ever published tweet he had put on sale in the form of an NFT

articles.title: Ripple cites Tetragon verdict to stress XRP’s status has not been determined yet
articles.description: A court in the U.S State of Delaware has rejected Tetragon Financial Group Ltd’s request for an order requiring Ripple to redeem the Series C preferred stock held by Tetragon. “This ruling, coupled with a separate filing the SEC made today, should put to rest any confusion. The SEC has NOT determined that XRP is […]

articles.title: Ripples Scores Legal Victory As Tetragon Loses Its Case Against Fintech Giant
articles.description: The court has declined Tetragon’s request to redeem its funds from Ripple due to the SEC legal suit claiming XRP to be a security

articles.title: Elon Musk Shills Dogecoin Again, Here’s What He’s Tweeted
articles.description: The Tesla CEO, who dreams to taking the mankind to Mars, continues shilling his favourite meme cryptocurrency DOGE. Here’s what he has tweeted this time
